mechanics.name: Affinity
mechanics.description: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent of the specified type you control.

mechanics.name: Cascade
mechanics.description: When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom of your library in a random order.

mechanics.name: Converge
mechanics.description: An ability word that notes effects which depend on the number of colors of mana spent to cast the spell.

mechanics.name: Crew
mechanics.description: Tap any number of creatures you control with total power greater than or equal to this vehicle's crew value: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

mechanics.name: Deathtouch
mechanics.description: Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.

mechanics.name: Double strike
mechanics.description: This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.

mechanics.name: Fight
mechanics.description: Each creature deals damage equal to its power to the other.

mechanics.name: First strike
mechanics.description: This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.

mechanics.name: Flash
mechanics.description: You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.

mechanics.name: Flashback
mechanics.description: You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.

mechanics.name: Flying
mechanics.description: This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.

mechanics.name: Grandeur
mechanics.description: An ability word that triggers when you discard another card with the same name as this permanent.

mechanics.name: Haste
mechanics.description: This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.

mechanics.name: Increment
mechanics.description: Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

mechanics.name: Infusion
mechanics.description: An ability word that grants a bonus effect if a specific condition is met, usually checking if you gained life this turn.

mechanics.name: Landfall
mechanics.description: Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, this ability triggers.

mechanics.name: Lifelink
mechanics.description: Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.

mechanics.name: Menace
mechanics.description: This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.

mechanics.name: Mill
mechanics.description: Put cards from the top of your library into your graveyard.

mechanics.name: Opus
mechanics.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, trigger this ability. Usually, it grants a massive bonus if five or more mana was spent to cast that spell.

mechanics.name: Paradigm
mechanics.description: Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.

mechanics.name: Prepared
mechanics.description: Represents an adventurer or split card mechanic. One half provides an early game spell, and the other half is the permanent.

mechanics.name: Reach
mechanics.description: This creature can block creatures with flying.

mechanics.name: Repartee
mechanics.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, trigger this ability.

mechanics.name: Surveil
mechanics.description: Look at the top cards of your library. You may put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.

mechanics.name: Trample
mechanics.description: This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.

mechanics.name: Treasure
mechanics.description: An artifact token that can be sacrificed to add one mana of any color.

mechanics.name: Vigilance
mechanics.description: Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.

mechanics.name: Ward
mechanics.description: Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays the Ward cost.

mechanics.name: Champion
mechanics.description: Exile a permanent of the specified type you control when this enters, or sacrifice it.

mechanics.name: Connive
mechanics.description: Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

mechanics.name: Convoke
mechanics.description: Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.

mechanics.name: Council's dilemma
mechanics.description: A voting mechanic where players vote and the spell has a cumulative effect for each vote.

mechanics.name: Cycling
mechanics.description: Pay the cycling cost and discard this card to draw a card.

mechanics.name: Delirium
mechanics.description: An ability word that cares if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.

mechanics.name: Enchant
mechanics.description: This aura targets a specific type of permanent or player.

mechanics.name: Enrage
mechanics.description: Whenever this creature is dealt damage, trigger an effect.

mechanics.name: Equip
mechanics.description: Pay the equip cost to attach this equipment to target creature you control.

mechanics.name: Evoke
mechanics.description: You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters the battlefield.

mechanics.name: Ferocious
mechanics.description: An ability word that checks if you control a creature with power 4 or greater.

mechanics.name: Hexproof
mechanics.description: This permanent cannot be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.

mechanics.name: Imprint
mechanics.description: Exile a card to imprint it. The permanent will refer to the exiled card for its effects.

mechanics.name: Improvise
mechanics.description: Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.

mechanics.name: Indestructible
mechanics.description: Effects that say "destroy" don't destroy this permanent.

mechanics.name: Investigate
mechanics.description: Create a Clue token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

mechanics.name: Kicker
mechanics.description: You may pay an additional cost as you cast this spell. If you do, the spell is kicked.

mechanics.name: Magecraft
mechanics.description: Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, trigger an effect.

mechanics.name: Metalcraft
mechanics.description: An ability word that gives a bonus if you control three or more artifacts.

mechanics.name: Morbid
mechanics.description: An ability word that triggers if a creature died this turn.

mechanics.name: Morph
mechanics.description: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its morph cost.

mechanics.name: Overload
mechanics.description: You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change its text by replacing all instances of "target" with "each".

mechanics.name: Partner
mechanics.description: You can have two commanders if both have partner.

mechanics.name: Role token
mechanics.description: Aura tokens attached to creatures that grant stats or abilities. A creature can only have one Role controlled by the same player at a time.

mechanics.name: Scry
mechanics.description: Look at the top cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom of your library and the rest on top in any order.

mechanics.name: Shroud
mechanics.description: This permanent cannot be the target of spells or abilities.

mechanics.name: Split second
mechanics.description: As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.

mechanics.name: Spree
mechanics.description: Choose one or more additional costs as you cast this spell to gain its effects.

mechanics.name: Storm
mechanics.description: When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.

mechanics.name: Suspend
mechanics.description: Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay its suspend cost and exile it with N time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, cast it without paying its mana cost.

mechanics.name: Vivid
mechanics.description: A land cycle that enters tapped with charge counters, which can be removed to produce mana of any color.
